title: Minnale Nee Vanthathenadi Lyrics May Madham
stanzas:
[Minnale nee
vanthathenadi.
en kannile oru
kaayam ennadi.
en vaanile nee maraindhu
pona maayam ennadi

sila naaligai
nee vandhu ponadhu
en maaligai adhu
vendhu ponadhu
minnale en vaanam
unnai thaeduthe.] (2)

Kanvizhithu paartha podhu
kalaindha vannamae.
un kairegai indru mattum
ninaivu chinname.

kathari kathari enadhu
ullam udainthu ponathe.
indru sidhari pona
sillil ellaam unadhu bimbame

kanneeril thee valarthu
kaathirukkiren
un kaaladi thalathil
naan pooththirukkiren

Minnale nee
vanthathenadi.
en kannile oru
kaayam ennadi.
en vaanile nee maraindhu
pona maayam ennadi

sila naaligai
nee vandhu ponadhu
en maaligai adhu
vendhu ponadhu
minnale en vaanam
unnai thaeduthe.

paal mazhaikku kaathirukkum
boomi illaiyaa
oru pandigaikku kaathirukkum
saami illaiyaa (2)

vaaarthai vara kaathirukkum
kavigyan illaiyaa
naan kaathirunthaal
kadhal innum
neelum illaiyaa!!

kanneeril thee valarthu
kaathirukkiren
un kaaladi thalathil
naan pooththirukkiren

Minnale nee
vanthathenadi.
en kannile oru
kaayam ennadi.
en vaanile nee maraindhu
pona maayam ennadi

sila naaligai
nee vandhu ponadhu
en maaligai adhu
vendhu ponadhu
minnale en vaanam
unnai thaeduthe.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses feelings of love and longing, capturing the essence of romantic emotions.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In May Madham, the song reflects the protagonist's deep feelings for their beloved, enhancing the romantic narrative of the film.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by SPB and composed by A.R. Rahman.

When was the song released?

Minnale Nee Vanthathenadi was released on September 9, 1994.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Minnale Nee Vanthathenadi, the protagonist expresses a deep yearning for their beloved, encapsulating the bittersweet nature of love. The song's melodic charm and poignant lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. As the music unfolds, it beautifully conveys the emotions of longing and affection, resonating with anyone who has experienced love's magic. This timeless classic continues to touch hearts, reminding listeners of the beauty of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Minnale Nee Vanthathenadi from May Madham is a timeless romantic melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With its enchanting lyrics and soulful rendition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the magic of love. The collaboration of A.R. Rahman's mesmerizing music and SPB's heartfelt vocals makes this track an unforgettable classic.
stanzaMeanings: You came like a lightning, what a wonder in my eyes. You are the magic that disappeared from my sky.
For a few days, you came to my palace, and that palace was meant for you, like a lightning, my sky searched for you.
When I saw your face, it was like a beautiful color. Today, your touch is a sweet memory.
My heart is broken, and today everything that has happened is your reflection.
I am waiting for the fire in my tears, and I am blooming at your feet.
You came like a lightning, what a wonder in my eyes. You are the magic that disappeared from my sky.
For a few days, you came to my palace, and that palace was meant for you, like a lightning, my sky searched for you.
Is there no land waiting for the milky rain? Is there no god waiting for a festival?
Is there no poet waiting for words? If I wait, will love still not bloom?
I am waiting for the fire in my tears, and I am blooming at your feet.
You came like a lightning, what a wonder in my eyes. You are the magic that disappeared from my sky.
For a few days, you came to my palace, and that palace was meant for you, like a lightning, my sky searched for you.
